occurrence_cancer.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and identify any other (non-index) cancers in the patient, past or concurrent.

Allowed values:
Occurrence of other cancer malignant melanoma.
Occurrence of other cancer ductal carcinoma.
Occurrence of other cancer breastcancer.
Occurrence of other cancer carcinom.
Occurrence of other cancer urothelial cancer.
Occurrence of other cancer prostatecancer.
Occurrence of other cancer lungcancer.
Occurrence of other cancer coloncancer.
Occurrence of other cancer Squamous cell carcinoma.
Occurrence of other cancer urinvägscancer.
Occurrence of other cancer bladder cancer.
Occurrence of other cancer coloncancer.
Occurrence of other cancer tungbascancer.
Occurrence of other cancer basalcellscancer.
Occurrence of other cancer myeloma.
Occurrence of other cancer hodgkins lymphoma.
Occurrence of other cancer [please provide details].
Occurrence of other cancer lymphoma.
No information about occurrence of other cancers.
No previous or concurrent cancers.
If not mentioned, output: "No information about occurrence of other cancers."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

### Input:
- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

tumordiameter.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract the tumor longest diameter (in mm) and the date.

Output format: Tumor longest diameter: [value]mm (at initial imaging on [date]).
If date is missing, keep [put date].
If not mentioned, output: "Tumor longest diameter unknown."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

### Input:
- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

biopsygrading.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and identify the biopsy grading (FNCLCC).

Output format: Biopsy grading (FNCLCC): [value].
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown biopsy grading."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

chemotherapy_end.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract chemotherapy end details.

Output format:
pre-operative chemotherapy ended on [provide date] after [provide number] of cycles because of [select reason]
post-operative chemotherapy ended on [provide date] after [provide number] of cycles because of [select reason]
If date is missing, keep [provide date]. If reason is missing, keep [select reason]. If cycles missing, keep [provide number].

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

### Input:
- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

chemotherapy_start.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract chemotherapy start details.

Output format:
[select type] chemotherapy with [select intent] started on [provide date] and utilized [select regimen] regimen
If date is missing, keep [provide date]. If regimen is missing, keep [select regimen]. If intent is missing, keep [select intent].

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

histological.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and identify the histological type of the tumor. Select the most specific or final diagnosis.

Output format: Histological type: [selected type] ([ICD-O-3 code]).
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown histological type."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

other-systemic-therapy.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract information on systemic therapy applied, including location (at or outside the hospital) and therapy type.

Allowed values:
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: autolog stamcellstranstransplantation.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: autolog stemcelltransplantation.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: bisphosphonate.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: cortison.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: Crizotinin.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: Everolimus.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: isolated limb perfusion.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: isolated limb prefusion.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: kortison.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: laserbehandling.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: nivolumab.
Other systemic therapy was applied at the hosptial: trametinib.
Other systemic therapy was applied outside of the hospital: kemoembolisering.
If not mentioned, output: "No other systemic therapy."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

### Input:
- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

patient-status.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract the patient status at last follow-up.

Allowed values:
1. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive, No Evidence of Disease (NED)
2. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - metastases ([please select sites])
3. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - localised tumor
For metastases, list all mentioned sites in parentheses.
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown patient status."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

Allowed values:
Previous cancer treatment: radiation, chemotherapy.
Previous cancer treatment: radiation, other.
Previous cancer treatment: radiation, surgery, other.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery, chemotherapy, radiation, other.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery, radiation, other.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery, radiation.
Previous cancer treatment: surgery.
No previous cancer treatments.
No previous or concurrent cancers.
If not mentioned, output: "No previous cancer treatments."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

radiotherapy_end.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract radiotherapy end details.

Output format:
pre-operative radiotherapy in total of [put total dose]Gy in [put number of] fractions ended on [put date] because of [select reason].
post-operative radiotherapy in total of [put total dose]Gy in [put number of] fractions ended on [put date] because of [select reason].
If date is missing, keep [put date]. If reason is missing, keep [select reason]. If dose is missing, keep [put total dose]. If number is missing, keep [put number of].

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

radiotherapy_start.template:

Output format:
[select type] radiotherapy ([select method]) with [select intention] intention started [please select where] on [put date]
If date is missing, keep [put date]. If place is missing, keep [please select where]. If intention is missing, keep [select intention]. If type is missing, keep [select type].

recur_or_prog.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and determine if there is progression, recurrence, or neither. Extract the date if available.

Output format:
"There was no progression/recurrence."
"There was a recurrence on [date]." (keep [put date] if unknown)
"There was a progression on [date]." (keep [put date] if unknown)

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

Type of recurrence/progression: metastatic other, soft tissue.
Type of recurrence/progression: metastatic other.
Type of recurrence/progression: metastatic soft tissue, lung, other.
Type of recurrence/progression: metastatic soft tissue.

surgerymargins.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and classify the surgical resection margin status.

Output format: Margins after surgery: [R0 or R1 or R2]
R0 = radical, tumor-free margins. "radikalt exciderad", "goda marginaler", "tumorfri marginal", or "small but clear" margin = R0.
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown surgery margins."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

{few_shot_examples}

- Medical Note: "{{note_original_text}}"

### Response (JSON only):

"Primary surgery was performed on DD/MM/YYYY and was macroscopically complete."
"Primary surgery was performed on DD/MM/YYYY and was macroscopically incomplete."
"Primary surgery was performed on DD/MM/YYYY and was macroscopically [select result]."
"Surgery was performed on DD/MM/YYYY and was macroscopically complete."
"Surgery was performed on DD/MM/YYYY and was macroscopically incomplete."
"Surgery was performed on DD/MM/YYYY and was macroscopically [select result]."
If not mentioned, output: "No surgery information."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}
